original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: William, Riley, Daniel, and Logan. William was heard saying, "Riley is a knight and William is a knight". Riley said, "If Riley is a knight then Logan is a knight." "Riley is a knave if and only if William is a knight," Daniel claimed. "William is a knight," Logan declared. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
